---
title: "Global Development & Geopolitical Risk Knowledge Graph Portal"
format:
  html:
    theme: dark
    toc: true
    css: styles.css
---

# Global Development & Risk Intelligence Portal

Welcome to the **Global Development Knowledge Management & Geopolitical Risk Portal**, powered by live World Bank Projects API ingestion and ACLED-style threat event feeds in RDF/OWL.

---

## 🎯 Load Multi-Hop Risk Assessment Templates

Use the dropdown below to inject pre-configured **2-Hop**, **3-Hop**, or **4-Hop** multi-hop risk queries into the SPARQL editor console:

```{html}
<div class="template-selector-container">
  <label for="template-select"><strong>Load Multi-Hop Risk Assessment:</strong></label>
  <select id="template-select" class="form-select">
    <option value="">-- Select a Multi-Hop Risk Assessment Template --</option>
    <option value="template1">Geographic Contagion (2-Hop Risk)</option>
    <option value="template2">Supply Chain Blast Radius (3-Hop Risk)</option>
    <option value="template3">Cross-Entity Dependency (4-Hop Risk)</option>
  </select>
</div>
```

---

## ⚡ Interactive SPARQL Workbench

```{html}
<div class="sparql-layout">
  <div class="sparql-editor-card">
    <div class="editor-header">
      <h3><i class="fa-solid fa-code"></i> SPARQL Query Console</h3>
    </div>
    
    <textarea id="sparql-input" spellcheck="false" rows="10" class="form-control"></textarea>
    
    <div class="editor-footer">
      <span id="engine-status" class="engine-badge"><i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i> Client-Side RDF Engine Active</span>
      <button id="btn-run-sparql" class="btn btn-primary">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-play"></i> Run SPARQL Query
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="results-card">
    <div class="results-header">
      <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.75rem;">
        <h3><i class="fa-solid fa-table-list"></i> Query Results</h3>
        <span id="results-count" class="badge">0 records</span>
        <span id="exec-time" class="time-badge">-- ms</span>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex; gap:0.5rem; align-items:center;">
        <input type="text" id="results-search" placeholder="Filter results..." class="table-search-input">
        <button id="btn-export-csv" class="btn-secondary">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-file-csv"></i> Export CSV
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="table-wrapper">
      <table id="results-table" class="table">
        <thead>
          <tr id="results-head">
            <th>Execute a SPARQL query to view results</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody id="results-body">
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

<script src="app.js"></script>
